# AgentEval

> Reliability and audit-evidence testing for LLM agents. Wrap any agent, assert its behavior, run N times to measure determinism (flakiness), check that claims are grounded in citations, and emit an audit-grade reliability report. Built for regulated and high-stakes domains (health, fintech, legal, compliance). TypeScript, ESM, Node >= 20. MIT.

## What it is
- Like unit tests + a crash-test rating for AI agents.
- Three eval layers: deterministic structural assertions, grounding/citation validation, and an optional LLM-as-judge with self-consistency.
- Differentiators vs other eval tools: determinism/flakiness scoring across N runs, grounding/auditability, and a filable audit attestation report (HTML). Plugs into existing traces (OpenTelemetry, LangSmith) and ships an MCP server.

## Install
- `npm install @lokeshkank/agenteval`
- Optional peers: `@anthropic-ai/sdk`, `@google/genai` (LLM-judge), `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk` (MCP server).

## Core concepts
- AgentAdapter: the one interface you implement - `run(input) => AgentTrace`. Wraps any agent.
- AgentTrace: `{ input:{user_message}, finalText, toolCalls[], citations?, steps?, iterations?, tokens?, durationMs?, error? }`.
- Scenario: `{ id, description?, tags?, input:{user_message}, asserts:[...], judge?:{rubric,votes?,passThreshold?} }`.
- Runner: runs each scenario N times; reports passingRuns/totalRuns as a determinism score.

## Key API (import from '@lokeshkank/agenteval')
- runScenario(adapter, scenario, options), runSuite(adapter, scenarios, options) -> SuiteReport
- loadScenarios(path), loadScenario(path), parseScenario(yaml)
- evaluateAssertions(trace, asserts, ctx?), summariseRun(trace)
- checkGrounding(trace, opts?), detectUncitedClaims, parseCitations, resolveCitations, quoteMatchesSource, GENERIC_PRESET, REGULATED_PRESET
- judge({trace, rubric, llm, votes?, passThreshold?}), createAnthropic(opts?), createGoogle(opts?), estimateCost(model,in,out)
- renderConsole(report), renderJson(report), renderHtml(report, meta?)
- otelToTrace(spans), langsmithToTrace(run)
- metrics.recallAtK / precisionAtK / reciprocalRank / mean / summarize / diffSummaries; computeRecordMetric(input)

## Assertion kinds
tool_called, tool_not_called, tool_input_contains_one_of, text_contains, text_contains_one_of, text_does_not_contain, output_contains_one_of, iteration_count_under, iteration_count_at_least, recall_at_k, every_claim_has_citation, citations_resolve, quote_matches_source, refusal

## CLI
- agenteval init | run [scenarios] | baseline [scenarios] | check [scenarios]
- Flags: --config <file>, --runs <n>, --json <file>, --html <file>, --baseline <file>, --tolerance <n>
- Config: agenteval.config.mjs default-exports { adapter, scenarios?, runs?, passThreshold?, llm?, assertion? }

## MCP server
- Tools: evaluate_agent {trace, asserts, preset?}, check_grounding {text|trace, preset?, knownSources?}, get_report {report, format?}
- Entry: dist/mcp/server.js (createServer(), main()).

## Docs
- README.md - human quickstart and full feature tour.
- AGENTS.md - canonical integration pattern for AI coding agents.
- bench/regulated/ - starter benchmark from public-domain US regulatory text (eCFR/FDA).
